{"id":2,"name":"Man contest","x":5,"y":4,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 01","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"pbIsWeekday(1, 2, 4, 6)"]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["Today is Tuesday (2), Thursday (4) or Saturday (6), "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["and the Bug Contest is running today. The weekday\u0027s "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["name is put in Game Variable 1."]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[12,"pbBugContestState.pbContestHeld?"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bWe hope you\u0027ll take part in a Bug-Catching Contest "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["in the future!"]},{"c":115,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bToday\u0027s \\v[1]."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bThat means the Bug-Catching Contest is on today."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bThe rules are simple."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bUsing one of your Pok\u00E9mon, catch a Bug-type "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon to be judged."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bWould you like to give it a try?"]},{"c":102,"i":1,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":111,"i":2,"p":[12,"pbBoxesFull?"]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\bSorry, your PC boxes are full."]},{"c":115,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":3,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bYou are only allowed to take 1 Pok\u00E9mon into the "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["Contest."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bPlease choose which Pok\u00E9mon you want to enter "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["with."]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Opens a screen for choosing an able Pok\u00E9mon (i.e. a "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["non-egg, non-fainted Pok\u00E9mon)."]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["The party index of the chosen Pok\u00E9mon is put in "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["Game Variable 1, and the chosen Pok\u00E9mon\u0027s name is "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["put in Game Variable 2."]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["pbChooseAblePokemon(1, 2)"]},{"c":111,"i":2,"p":[1,1,0,0,4]},{"c":108,"i":3,"p":["Cancelled choosing a Pok\u00E9mon."]},{"c":101,"i":3,"p":["\\bOK.
